name: AIESL – Trainee Aircraft Maintenance Engineer – 65 Posts

basic_details.job_title: AIESL Trainee Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 65 Posts
basic_details.short_information: AIESL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 65 vacancies for Trainee Aircraft Maintenance Engineer posts. Candidates can apply online only from 21.05.2026 to 26.05.2026 through AIESL website aiesl.in.
basic_details.organization_name: HR - HQ, AI Engineering Services Limited
basic_details.application_mode: Online only - via Google Form link available on AIESL website (https://forms.gle/P3KpXSsJGJ4dYNh59)

qualification.education_qualification: Must have passed all B1 or B2 Modules of DGCA knowledge examinations; OR hold a B1 DGCA License or B2 DGCA License within AIESL capability. RT License would be preferred.

selection_process: Assessment of eligibility criteria by a duly constituted committee
To be notified by AIESL after closing date
how_to_apply: Only serving employees of AIESL who meet the prescribed qualifications as of 01-05-2026 may apply. Applications must be submitted online through the Google Form link available on the AIESL website. No other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates who had applied against any previous notification for Trainee AME must apply afresh. Applications received after the last date (1700 hours, 26-05-2026) will be rejected without any reference.
